theme: Set inlet concentrations in a fixed mixing manifold
title: Manifold Inversion: Setting Inlets to Hit Leaf Targets
strategies: trivial: inject nothing (all inlets at zero) -> reproduces the do-nothing baseline
greedy: solve the unconstrained linear least-squares inverse per species (normal equations) then clip inlets into [0,cap] -- the box is ignored during the solve
strong: project onto the achievable zonotope {A x : 0<=x<=cap} via box-constrained regularized least squares (FISTA), trading the few high-influence trunk inlets against the many leaves they feed
exploit that shared ancestors couple leaves so the reachable output set is a cone; prioritize bottleneck inlets and respect the box throughout instead of clipping after an unconstrained solve
